title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 21–21, this part focuses on Luffy as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.
